title: CubicleOS: A Library OS with Software Componentisation for Practical Isolation
author: Vasily A. Sartakov
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This artefact contains the library OS, two applications, isolation monitor, and scripts to reproduce experiments from the ASPLOS 2021 paper by V. A. Sartakov, L. Vilanova, R. Pietzuch — CubicleOS: A Library OS with Software Componentisation for Practical Isolation, which isolates components of a monolithic library OS without the use of message-based IPC primitives.
steps_raw: This artefact contains the library OS, two applications, isolation monitor, and scripts to reproduce experiments from the ASPLOS 2021 paper by V. A. Sartakov, L. Vilanova, R. Pietzuch — CubicleOS: A Library OS with Software Componentisation for Practical Isolation, which isolates components of a monolithic library OS without the use of message-based IPC primitives.
